data.title: b9b9-18e3: Task A — Write RED structural tests for intent-search caller traversal (Step 7b and INTENT_CONFLICT)
data.description:
## Story
b9b9-18e3 — Enhance intent-search to validate bug behavioral claims against actual callers

## testing_mode
RED

## TDD Test Approach
Create tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh with 7 structural assertion sections. Each section greps plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md for required content that does not yet exist.

Given: plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md exists in its current form (no Step 7b, no TRAVERSAL_CHECKPOINT, no INTENT_CONFLICT)
When: tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh is executed
Then: all 7 test sections fail (RED) because the required content has not been added yet

## File to Create
tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh (executable)

## Test Sections (7 required)

1. **test_step_7b_exists** — grep for 'Step 7b' in plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md; assert the section header exists
2. **test_traversal_checkpoint_protocol** — grep for 'TRAVERSAL_CHECKPOINT' in intent-search.md; assert it is documented
3. **test_intent_conflict_signal_fields** — grep for all 3 additional INTENT_CONFLICT fields: 'behavioral_claim', 'conflicting_callers', 'dependency_classification'; each must be present
4. **test_dependency_classification_enum** — grep for both enum values: 'behavioral_dependency' and 'incidental_usage'; both must be present
5. **test_traversal_level_cap** — grep for '3' near 'level' context (3-level traversal cap); assert the 3-level cap is documented
6. **test_budget_cap_advisory** — grep for 'advisory' in intent-search.md; assert the budget cap is documented as advisory (not mandatory) for historical search steps
7. **test_gate_signal_schema_updated** — grep gate-signal-schema.md Consumers section for 'b9b9-18e3' or 'INTENT_CONFLICT'; assert the consumer row was added (forward-reference; will remain RED until Task C runs)

## .test-index Entry (add ONE entry)
plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md: tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh [test_step_7b_exists]

Note: ONE entry per source→test mapping. The [test_step_7b_exists] RED marker blocks epic closure until content is added and tests pass. Fuzzy match fails for .md source files — the .test-index entry is required for the test gate to find this test.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh exists and is executable (chmod +x)
  Verify: test -x tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh
- [ ] Test file contains all 7 test sections (each section named and executable)
  Verify: grep -c 'test_step_7b_exists\|test_traversal_checkpoint_protocol\|test_intent_conflict_signal_fields\|test_dependency_classification_enum\|test_traversal_level_cap\|test_budget_cap_advisory\|test_gate_signal_schema_updated' tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh | awk '{exit ( < 7)}'
- [ ] Running the test suite produces failures (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-intent-search-agent.sh; [ 0 -ne 0 ]
- [ ] .test-index entry added with RED marker for plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md
  Verify: grep 'plugins/dso/agents/intent-search.md.*\[test_step_7b_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes (test gate records RED status; RED is acceptable pre-implementation)
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
